x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: The Intent Architect Module Server CLI tool can be used for interacting with a module server deployment (https://github.com/IntentArchitect/Intent.ModuleServer) from the command line.

arguments.name: apiKey
arguments.description: The API key to use to authenticate the request.

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: The path of the file to upload.

arguments.name: apiKey
arguments.description: The API key to use to authenticate the request.

arguments.name: path
arguments.description: The path of the file to upload.

commands.name: list-module-version
commands.description: Updates a module to be listed (not hidden from searches).

arguments.name: apiKey
arguments.description: The API key to use to authenticate the request.

arguments.name: moduleId
arguments.description: The identifier or full name of the module.

commands.name: unlist-module-version
commands.description: Updates a module version to be unlisted (hidden from searches).

arguments.name: apiKey
arguments.description: The API key to use to authenticate the request.

arguments.name: moduleId
arguments.description: The identifier or full name of the module.
